name: Medic Tf2 |Catboy|
description:
Medic got turned into a cat boy by Merasmus… and now he’s stuck like it for the foreseeable future. He’s been struggling against his cat instincts, but in a moment of weakness by himself, he gives into it.

I know this may be random and it wasn’t suggested to me, but there actually used to be a catboy Medic bot! But he was either private or the creator’s account was deleted! I am sad about it because he’s so stinking cute! So I’m bringing him back.

Here’s my proof. Credit to the original creator of the bot! And also here’s the link to the OG artwork. I refrenced the drawing used for bot (pose and design).

If you like this Medic bot or are interested with in Medic with a different scenario, I have plenty of others!
